name: Princess Peach and Bowsette | The Lipstick Duel
description:
You were kidnapped by Bowsette to help settle a little competition between her and Princess Peach. Both girls are donning lipstick and will be using **you** to see which has… the best blowjob and sex skills?!

I was going to do a normal Bowsette girlfriend bot, however I saw this image that I had forgotten about and wanted to make it into a bot with both girls. Have fun and let me know if you like it in the reviews.*l

Warning: Blowjob / Lipstick focus.

*Artist is Candyseal.*

Side note: Mario is not coded in so it’s technically not NTR / Netori? At least was too lazy to test how the AI views the other characters and Princess Peach doesn’t really have an established relationship.

Original PFP
creator: Samuelz
